LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BERNARD HAGAN'S MOTION TO VACATE RENEWED JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A SUBSTANTIVE REPLY BRIEF. PLAINTIFF SHALL RE-SERVE DEFENDANT WITH ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS BY OCTOBER 3, 2014, AS DEFENDANT FILED A NOTICE OF NON-RECEIPT OF THE OPPOSITION. DEFENDANT'S REPLY BRIEF IS DUE FIVE COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 1005. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Renewed Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BERNARD HAGAN's Motion To Vacate Renewed Judgment is Off calendar per moving party's request. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Renewed Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BERNARD HAGAN's Motion To Vacate Renewed Judgment is continued to October 21, 2014 to give Defendant the opportunity to file a substantive reply brief. Plaintiff shall re-serve Defendant with its opposition papers by October 3, 2014, as Defendant filed a notice of non-receipt of the opposition. Defendant's reply brief is due five court days before the hearing pursuant to CCP sec. 1005. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Off Calendar
